code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut have = false
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if done
      i = n + 1
    else
      if is_ws
        if have
          if total + cur > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = total + cur
          end
          cur = 0
          have = false
        end
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        have = true
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
